meaning: n.平民,公务员,文官adj.民间的,民用的
examples: A civilian was killed by a stray bullet.
They bombed military and civilian targets.
His supporters want a clean-up of civilian corruption.
Civilian deaths from violence in Iraq fell sharply in May, according to Iraqi government figures.
Japan, France, other countries have a safe, secure, reliable and effective nuclear -- civilian nuclear energy.
